use_cases: Display time-series metrics and analytics data in dashboards
Monitor system performance or business KPIs with real-time visualization
Visualize trends in fintech applications like portfolio tracking or market data
Create HUD-style data displays for gaming or control panel interfaces
Build analytics views for SaaS products and monitoring tools
ai_summary: A HUD-styled area chart component built with Recharts primitives, featuring dark mode support and interactive hover tooltips. Designed for displaying time-series data in dashboards and analytics views with a cyberpunk-inspired aesthetic. The component uses a flexible ChartConfig system for theming and supports responsive layouts across desktop and mobile platforms.
